summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MathPlay Kids subscription-based math learning platform. All backend APIs working perfectly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend user flows including registration, child management, payment system, and admin dashboard all functional. Successfully tested user registration, child profile creation, subscription payment flow with QR code, and admin payment approval system.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard may not refresh properly after payment modal submission - shows 'No children yet' after successful child creation and payment

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity (19/19 endpoints - 100% success rate)
User authentication system (register, login, profile retrieval)
Child management (create, list, get details, update progress)
Question generation for all modules (counting, numbers, addition, subtraction, shapes, quiz)
Manual payment system with QR code support
Admin dashboard with stats, user management, payment approval
Landing page loads with hero section and pricing cards
User registration flow with form validation
QR payment method with bank QR code display
JWT token authentication throughout the app
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI refresh issue in dashboard after payment submission - child list may not update immediately after payment modal closes. Consider adding a page refresh or state update after successful payment submission.
